Meaning.En: The outer edge of a wheel, typically where the tire is mounted.
Meaning.Example: The rim of the bicycle wheel was bent after the crash.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả bộ phận kim loại hoặc hợp kim bên ngoài của bánh xe ô tô, xe đạp.
Situation.En: Describing the metal or alloy outer part of a car or bicycle wheel.

Situation.Vi: Thường được dùng khi nói về thay hoặc sửa chữa lốp xe.
Situation.En: Commonly used when discussing tire replacement or wheel repair.

Meaning.En: The curved upper edge or border of a container, such as a cup, pot, or bucket.
Meaning.Example: She held the coffee cup by its rim to avoid burning her fingers.

Situation.Vi: Khi rót nước hoặc uống từ cốc, tay cầm vào vành.
Situation.En: When pouring or drinking from a cup, holding it by the rim.

Meaning.En: The circular frame surrounding the lens of eyeglasses or the top edge of a hat.
Meaning.Example: The rim of his glasses was slightly crooked.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả khung kim loại hoặc nhựa bao quanh tròng kính.
Situation.En: Describing the metal or plastic frame surrounding the lenses of eyeglasses.
